title: Sith Empire uniforms
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{MultipleIssues|expand|image}}
[[File:Sithtroopermodel.jpg|thumb|right|150px|A [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] trooper.]]
The [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] was known to have a variety of '''uniforms''' and [[Armor/Legends|armor]] for their military personnel with the idea of having them stand out amongst their enemies. This ranged from simple uniforms to full armor suits.

==Trooper==
===Sith Trooper===
{{Main|Sith trooper armor/Legends}}
[[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]] had armor with reflective styling and [[Color/Legends|black]] face mask, the armor covered the wearer completely, and even had a one-way visor. They also were protected by sixteen [[Silver/Legends|silver]] plates attached to their uniforms. The majority of Sith troopers wore armor with a silver sheen, some higher ranks wore crimson colored armor.

==Officers==
===Sith officer, male===
{{Main|Sith officer}}
Sith Officers wore a blue [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] with campaign ribbons on the left breast, as well as [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] symbols on either shoulders. They wore light gray pants as well. They also had black [[Boot/Legends|boots]] and black [[Belt/Legends|belts]] on which they carried their [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]]. A hat symbolized [[Officer/Legends|officer]] status. [[Glove/Legends|Gloves]] were optional.

===Sith General===
[[General/Legends|Generals]] wore a uniform identical to the regular Sith officer's uniform save for more medals, with green and had red cufflinks.

===Sith Fleet Commander===
[[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] uniforms consisted of a black jacket with gray rank identifying [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldrons]] at either shoulder. There were campaign ribbons on the left breast, and a red sash coming down from right shoulder. Red and gold command status symbols were worn at their left and right collar. They also had light gray pants and a gray hat.

==Sith and Dark Jedi==
===Sith Warrior===
{{Main|Sith Warrior}}
Sith Warriors wore mainly red and black. They had bulky, red, shoulder pads and what appears to be an overcoat. They also wore a red [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] with a small slit, presumably to look out of. They wore black pants and large brown boots. Sith Warriors did not use weapons, fighting instead with their [[Unarmed combat/Legends|armored hands]].

====Sith Marauder====
{{Main|Sith Marauder}}
Sith Marauders wore black tops and pants, they also wore a black belt and shoes. It appears that under their black top they wore a red top with a slightly higher collar.

===Sith Acolyte===
{{Main|Sith acolyte/Legends}}
Sith Acolytes wore green and orange with black boots and an orange hood. They wore fingerless gloves and left their face, apart from the hood, unguarded.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
